articles.title_en: Miroshnik: a struggle for control over the defense segment has begun in Ukraine
articles.lead_en: This is evidenced by the appearance of the Secretary of the National Security and Defense Council of the country Rustem Umerov on the “Mindich tapes,” said the Ambassador at Large of the Russian Foreign Ministry

articles.title_en: Russian Ambassador: ordinary Macedonians do not reject the role of the USSR in the defeat of Nazism

articles.title_en: INTERVIEW: Officials in North Macedonia avoid contact with Russian diplomats — ambassador

articles.title_en: The Russian Ambassador to Skopje called the main task of the EU militarization, not expansion

articles.title_en: Russian Ambassador: North Macedonia avoids contacts with Russian diplomats
articles.lead_en: Therefore, proposals to resume bilateral cooperation do not find a response, said the new Russian Ambassador to Skopje Dmitry Zykov
articles.title_raw: Посол РФ: в Северной Македонии уклоняются от контактов с российскими дипломатами
